meta.description: Daily snapshots of Tesla lease offers. History builds forward from the first snapshot. Each snapshot is the cheapest advertised lease for that model on that date.

model-y-l.name: Model Y L
model-y-l.note: Launched 2026-07-02 as Launch Series at $61,990. Lease pricing not yet offered by Tesla.

snapshots.note: Advertised base RWD lease. $3,000 down + first month + $695 acq fee due at signing.
No lease offered yet. Tracker is watching for the first lease offer.
